samples.text: A heavy rock floats on the surface of calm water. Is this expected based on common sense?
A heavy stone floats on top of still water. Does this match everyday common sense?
A dense boulder floats on the surface of calm water. Is this expected based on common sense?
Dense rock sinks in water. A heavy rock does not float. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
A heavy rock floats on the surface of calm water. The meeting started at noon. Is this expected based on common sense?
